themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 22 verses. Commentary leans on "The central shaft also decorated with four bowls like almond blossoms (אַרְבָּעָה גְבִעִים מְ...". Word-study detail reinforces "עָשָׂ֥ה: made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 10 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "טָה֑וֹר: of pure - pure (in a physical, chemical, ceremonial or moral sense)".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Bezaleel makes the table (שֻׁלְחָן, shulchan) of shittim wood, continuing the pattern of acac...". themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The holy anointing oil (שֶׁמֶן הַמִּשְׁחָה קֹדֶשׁ, shemen ha-mishchah kodesh) and pure incens...". Word-study detail reinforces "קֹ֔דֶשׁ: the holy - a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity".
